daily.today_energy: Your aura's giving grounded productivity energy. Venus is whispering that it's time to stop overthinking and start trusting your gut. The universe is literally asking you to move at your own pace today—no rush.
daily.love: Someone's been trying to catch your attention, and honestly? Your vibe is magnetic rn. Whether you're single or coupled up, lean into authenticity. Real connections happen when you drop the walls and just be you.
daily.career: This is your moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on. Your creative energy is aligned with opportunity, and people are actually listening. Trust the momentum—you've earned this visibility.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding activities today. Think long walks, stretching, or literally just touching grass. Your nervous system will thank you for slowing down and reconnecting with the physical world.

weekly.overview: Your vibe this week is all about grounding and getting real with yourself. The cosmos is gently nudging you to let go of what's been weighing you down and lean into your natural magnetism. Trust the process—something's shifting beneath the surface.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or single, there's an invitation to be more authentic in your connections. Stop overthinking and let your heart lead a little. The energy suggests meaningful conversations that actually matter, not just surface-level stuff.
weekly.career: This is your moment to show up differently at work. Your energy is magnetic right now, so lean into collaboration and share your actual ideas without second-guessing yourself. Something you've been building is ready to level up—stay tuned.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding activities this week—think walks, stretching, or anything that gets you present in your physical form. The vibe supports gentle movement over intensity. Listen to what makes you feel stable and nourished.
